text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Learning that Air Groove is overseeing a dance lesson for a group of
other students after school, I decide to drop by and watch.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Stay in formation! First the box step, then the turn! Maintain eye
contact!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're finished if you fall behind tempo! Next is a heel step. Get
ready to come forward!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While her tone is stern, the instruction is precise. This is an Air
Groove dance lesson through and through.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's switch to pair training. Get with a partner and begin the
routine!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? Were you always there?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The winning concert is an integral part of any Umamusume's duties.
Naturally, dance practice is going to be tough.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: It's so awesome to get lessons from the Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Can't be sloppy in front of her! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The excited dancer stumbles out of line.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey, keep your eyes on—you'll fall!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove rushes over to cushion the girl's fall.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Ow ow ow...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Waaaahhh! Air Groove! Are—are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm fine... This is nothing to be alarmed by.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some initial resistance, I convince Air Groove to come with me
to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The physician declares it a minor sprain. There is a little swelling, but
fortunately there's no damage to the ligaments or bone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Then there's nothing stopping me from getting back to work. If you'll
excuse me, I have a lesson to teach.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What do you want? Those girls are counting on me for instruction.
Don't get in my way.
choice_data_list: I'd prefer if you took better care of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Better care? I think I've got that under control, thank you. You've no
grounds to be telling me how to take care of myself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
An empress cannot abandon those in need for anything. A mere
scratch is no reason to—
choice_data_list:
You're hurt! What could be more important than
that?!

You're hurt! What could be more important than
that?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: B-back off! I could hear you where you were standing before.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh please, stop with that face. Geez, what's gotten into you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I suppose... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Fine. I'll take the rest of the day off and let them know we'll resume
practice at a later date.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It won't do for an empress to allow her audience to see her in
anything less than an ideal state.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...And I suppose causing anxiety for one's trainer isn't very
empress-like either.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: All right, enough talk! I'm going to nap here for a while.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, off you go then. Do you want me to get some rest or not?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I happily allow myself to be kicked out of the infirmary.
